MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Roman Otkupman, Esq. of Otkupman Law Firm (tel: 818-293-5623) for the Plaintiff.
Atty. Katie Sharpless, Esq. of Hanson Bridgett LLP (tel: 415-777-3200) for Defendant Caritas Management Corporation.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION's Motion Of Defendant Caritas Management Corporation For Request For Early Evaluation Conference And Stay Of Proceedings.

Matter discussed. Upon conclusion, the Court continues the matter to October 9, 2025 at 9:00 A.M. in Department 301. The parties may submit a joint stipulation in advance of the hearing.
